headline: Is lululemon athletica inc. (LULU) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is LULU a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on lululemon athletica inc. on Christian’s Substack by Stoklund Capital. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on LULU. lululemon athletica inc.’s share was trading at $157.78 as of March 13th. LULU’s trailing and forward P/E were 10.97 and 12.22, respectively according to […]
